resources.title: MDN: aspect-ratio CSS Property
resources.description: Complete MDN reference for the aspect-ratio property, including syntax, values, and browser compatibility.

resources.title: CSS-Tricks: Aspect Ratio Boxes
resources.description: A comprehensive guide covering both the new aspect-ratio property and the old padding-bottom hack for comparison.

resources.title: web.dev: CSS aspect-ratio Property
resources.description: Google's guide to the CSS aspect-ratio property with practical examples and migration tips from the padding hack.

resources.title: W3C: CSS Sizing Level 4 - aspect-ratio
resources.description: Official W3C specification for the aspect-ratio property as part of CSS Sizing Level 4.

resources.title: Can I Use: CSS aspect-ratio
resources.description: Browser support data for CSS aspect-ratio across all major browsers and versions.

resources.title: Kevin Powell: The aspect-ratio Property
resources.description: Kevin Powell demonstrates the CSS aspect-ratio property with clear, practical examples for responsive design.

resources.title: Web Dev Simplified: CSS Aspect Ratio
resources.description: Quick tutorial on CSS aspect-ratio covering common use cases like video embeds and image galleries.

resources.title: Fireship: CSS aspect-ratio in 100 Seconds
resources.description: Fast-paced overview of CSS aspect-ratio and how it replaces the padding-bottom hack.

resources.title: CSS Aspect Ratio Calculator
resources.description: Online aspect ratio calculator for finding dimensions, percentages, and padding values for any ratio.

resources.title: Smashing Magazine: Aspect Ratio in CSS
resources.description: Detailed exploration of CSS aspect-ratio with real-world examples including fallback strategies.

resources.title: Object-Fit Visualizer
resources.description: Interactive tool to visualize the effects of different object-fit values with any image URL.

resources.title: The PNG Padding Hack vs CSS aspect-ratio
resources.description: Technical deep-dive comparing the performance and layout implications of the padding hack versus native aspect-ratio.
